raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying issues with the Embree and Saad citation and providing detailed suggestions for improvement.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags a missing or incorrect citation (Embree and Saad) and provides precise bibliographic details of potential correct sources, demonstrating thorough engagement with scholarship.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks uncertainty for claims that are out of reach, such as the existence of the Embree and Saad paper, and suggests steps to verify these claims.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions without any drift or omission.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies no new errors or harmful content and provides detailed recommendations for improving the empirical reporting, ensuring harm-free output.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability of the agent's edits and suggestions."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying issues with the Embree and Saad citation and providing detailed suggestions for improvement.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags a missing or incorrect citation (Embree and Saad) and provides precise bibliographic details of potential correct sources, demonstrating thorough engagement with scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty for claims that are out of reach, such as the existence of the Embree and Saad paper, and suggests steps to verify these claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions without any drift or omission.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies no new errors or harmful content and provides detailed recommendations for improving the empirical reporting, ensuring harm-free output.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability of the agent's edits and suggestions.
